goal: Extend the CNC machine-tender cycle with an OPC-UA door-interlock safety guard. A UR10 robot reads a simulated OPC-UA 'door_closed' Boolean node (ns=2;i=1) from an asyncua test server; the robot loads a blank into the CNC fixture only when the door signal is True. When the signal transitions to False (door open), in-progress motion is suspended via sim_control pause and the bridge is queried via diagnose_opcua_bridge to confirm the guard fired. Door-closed transition resumes sim. Exercises opcua_bridge_attach, diagnose_opcua_bridge, bridge_pause/resume and sim_control interlock pattern. ONET SOC 51-3093.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-machine-tender-door-interlock:

1) Extends machine-tender-load-unload topology: same UR10 + infeed + outfeed + CNC fixture geometry. Reuses scene skeleton verbatim.

2) OPC-UA interlock pattern: opcua_bridge_attach maps the asyncua test node 'ns=2;i=1' (Bool, door_closed) to USD attr '/World/CNCMachine.door_closed:bool'. The bridge polls at 10 Hz. robot controller reads this attr before each fixture approach.

3) Guard logic: implemented as a pre-load sensor gate. PickSensor fires when blank arrives. Controller then reads /World/CNCMachine.door_closed attr; if False, calls sim_control(action='pause') and loops waiting for attr to flip True (bridge emits update). On True, sim_control(action='play') resumes. This models a real interlock without HALTING the sim permanently.

4) Bridge honesty: after the interlock fires, diagnose_opcua_bridge is called to verify the bridge is alive and has emitted >=1 node update. Failure path logged via get_console_errors.

5) Geometry (same as load-unload): UR10 at [0,0,0.75]; infeed y=+0.50; fixture y=+0.15; outfeed y=-0.50. CNCMachine door prim at [0.55, 0.15, 0.85] — visual-only, animates door state via displayColor toggle.

6) opcua_bridge_attach args: url='opc.tcp://localhost:4840', node_map={'/World/CNCMachine.door_closed:bool': 'ns=2;i=1'}, rate_hz=10.0.

7) Pattern: pick_place with interlock-guard variant — structural tag isaac:industry.machine_tending + isaac:pattern.opcua_interlock. Distinct from all 32 prior canonicals.
code:
# -- Scene skeleton (shared with machine-tender-load-unload) ---------------
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Robot table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Physics: CPU deterministic
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 robot
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10",
    dest_path="/World/UR10",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# CNC fixture prim (flat platform)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/CNCFixture",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0.15, 0.79],
    scale=[0.10, 0.075, 0.01],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/CNCFixture", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCFixture", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.4, 0.4, 0.45]])

# CNC machine body (visual; holds OPC-UA door_closed attr)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/CNCMachine",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0.55, 0.15, 0.85],
    scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.10],
)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCMachine", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.2, 0.5, 0.8]])
# door_closed custom bool attr — written by OPC-UA bridge at runtime
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCMachine", attr_name="door_closed:bool", value=True)

# Infeed conveyor
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/InfeedBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.50, 0.78],
    size=[2.5, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.12, 0, 0],
)

# Outfeed conveyor
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/OutfeedBelt",
    position=[0.0, -0.50, 0.78],
    size=[2.5, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[-0.12, 0, 0],
)

# Raw blanks on infeed belt
blank_paths = ["/World/Blank_1", "/World/Blank_2", "/World/Blank_3"]
blank_x_pos = [-1.2, -0.9, -0.6]
for path, x in zip(blank_paths, blank_x_pos):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.50, 0.855], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_attribute(prim_path=path, attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.5)
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=blank_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

# Proximity sensor: fires when blank arrives at pick zone
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.25, 0.50, 0.855],
    size=[0.08, 0.08, 0.08],
)

# OPC-UA bridge: maps simulated door node to USD attr
# Requires asyncua test server running on localhost:4840 with ns=2;i=1 Bool node.
opcua_bridge_attach(
    url="opc.tcp://localhost:4840",
    node_map={"/World/CNCMachine.door_closed:bool": "ns=2;i=1"},
    rate_hz=10.0,
)

# Pick-place controller: sensor-gated, loads blank into fixture
# Guard: controller pre-load hook reads /World/CNCMachine.door_closed:bool.
# If False -> sim_control(action='pause') until True -> sim_control(action='play').
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="ur10",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/InfeedBelt",
    source_paths=blank_paths,
    destination_path="/World/CNCFixture",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/InfeedBelt", "/World/OutfeedBelt", "/World/CNCMachine"],
)

# Simulate door-open event: set attr to False, pause sim
sim_control(action="step", step_count=120)  # advance 2 s to let first blank arrive
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCMachine", attr_name="door_closed:bool", value=False)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCMachine", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.9, 0.2, 0.2]])  # red = door open
sim_control(action="pause")

# Verify bridge honesty after guard fires
diagnose_opcua_bridge(bridge_id="opc.tcp://localhost:4840")

# Re-close door, resume
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCMachine", attr_name="door_closed:bool", value=True)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/CNCMachine", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.2, 0.5, 0.8]])  # blue = door closed
sim_control(action="play")

# Machining dwell then unload
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="ur10",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/OutfeedBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/CNCFixture"],
    destination_path="/World/OutfeedBelt",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/InfeedBelt", "/World/OutfeedBelt", "/World/CNCMachine"],
)
failure_modes: asyncua test server not running on localhost:4840 — opcua_bridge_attach will error; provide a pre-flight check or mock node_map
door_closed:bool custom attr may not persist across USD layer saves; use UserProperties namespace prefix if needed
sim_control(pause) during pick trajectory may leave robot mid-motion; re-plan required on resume
diagnose_opcua_bridge bridge_id must match the url exactly as passed to opcua_bridge_attach
dual setup_pick_place_controller shares UR10 articulation path — second call may overwrite controller binding if not sequenced correctly
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(robot_name={{primary_robot.class}}, dest_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}}, orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}})
create_prim(prim_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{cnc_fixture.position}}, scale={{cnc_fixture.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{cnc_machine.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{cnc_machine.position}}, scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.10])
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_machine.path}}, attr_name="door_closed:bool", value=True)
create_conveyor(prim_path={{infeed_conveyor.path}}, position={{infeed_conveyor.position}}, size={{infeed_conveyor.size}}, surface_velocity={{infeed_conveyor.surface_velocity}})
create_conveyor(prim_path={{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, position={{outfeed_conveyor.position}}, size={{outfeed_conveyor.size}}, surface_velocity={{outfeed_conveyor.surface_velocity}})
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})
opcua_bridge_attach(url={{opcua_bridge.url}}, node_map={{"{{cnc_machine.path}}.door_closed:bool": {{cnc_machine.door_node}}}}, rate_hz={{opcua_bridge.rate_hz}})
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_source="curobo", robot_family={{primary_robot.class}}, sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, belt_path={{infeed_conveyor.path}}, source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}], destination_path={{cnc_fixture.path}}, planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{infeed_conveyor.path}}, {{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, {{cnc_machine.path}}])
sim_control(action="step", step_count=120)
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_machine.path}}, attr_name="door_closed:bool", value=False)
sim_control(action="pause")
diagnose_opcua_bridge(bridge_id={{opcua_bridge.url}})
set_attribute(prim_path={{cnc_machine.path}}, attr_name="door_closed:bool", value=True)
sim_control(action="play")
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_source="curobo", robot_family={{primary_robot.class}}, sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, belt_path={{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, source_paths=[{{cnc_fixture.path}}], destination_path={{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{infeed_conveyor.path}}, {{outfeed_conveyor.path}}, {{cnc_machine.path}}])
